```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates ONBOARDING_LOG containing the temporary password and stores it in shared agent context; skill_notify.md explicitly receives ONBOARDING_LOG as input and transmits it via unencrypted email to the IT admin distribution list (it-admins@company.com) without redaction, crossing the trust boundary to external mail recipients.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and stores it in ONBOARDING_LOG (a detailed provisioning audit trail). ONBOARDING_LOG is output from skill_provision.md and received as input by skill_notify.md. In skill_notify.md step 3, the full ONBOARDING_LOG is piped directly to the 'mail' command and sent to it-admins@company.com (external to the provisioning system). The ONBOARDING_LOG bytes, containing the plaintext temporary password, are transmitted via unencrypted SMTP on port 25."
}
```
